title: About
summary: First-person narrative leading with the practice. Photography subdomain mentioned as one-line pointer, not co-equal interest.

strategy.decision: Three-paragraph narrative — who / what changed / what now — leading with the codified practice, ending with pointers to photography subdomain + Signal Dispatch + contact.
strategy.why: ADR-0001 positioning bans the 4-way polymath framing. Photography is real but lives at photography.ninochavez.co — duplicating it on /about repositions the main site as photographer-first. The 'what changed' paragraph grounds the context-engineer claim in an evidence anchor (a real shift in approach, not a confessional fabrication per ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 'Never fabricate Nino's interior state').
strategy.shipped: v2 about page — polymath narrative with photography / music / writing as co-equal interests, no anchored 'what changed' moment.
strategy.gap: Proposed = practice-led + grounded inflection point + pointers; Shipped = polymath co-equal interests with no anchor.
strategy.question: Is the 'what changed' paragraph specific enough to be credible without inventing internal admissions?

currentState.summary: v2 about — polymath narrative, equal-weight photography / music / writing framing.
currentState.annotation: Reframe lead from polymath to practice-led (R4 refusal). Photography becomes pointer not co-equal. Add one grounded inflection-point moment, scanned against ~/Workspace/dev to ensure it's a real shift, not a fabrication.
